heading: Shipyards located outside of the United States
label: 891e–1 Shipyards located outside of the United States
text: On and after , none of the funds made available in this Act or any other Act may be used for the construction, repair (other than emergency repair), overhaul, conversion, or modernization of vessels for the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration in shipyards located outside of the United States.December 26, 2007
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is div. B of , , , known as the Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 2008. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 110–161121 Stat. 1884Dec. 26, 2007

CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 2008, and also as part of the Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2008, and not as part of the NOAA Fleet Modernization Act which comprises this subchapter.
